name: Zuni Cafe
reason: San Francisco institution with a famous roast chicken for two that encourages pair sharing at the table.

name: Tartine Manufactory
reason: Bright, airy space in the Mission perfect for casual team breakfasts and morning planning.

name: State Bird Provisions
reason: Michelin-starred dim sum cart format where dishes come to you, creating a lively shared dining experience.

name: Nopalito
reason: Organic Mexican cuisine with generous portions and a warm atmosphere ideal for team lunches.

name: Burma Superstar
reason: Unique Burmese cuisine that introduces teams to unfamiliar flavors, sparking conversation and curiosity.

name: Hog Island Oyster Co.
reason: Ferry Building waterfront location with communal oyster shucking that doubles as a team activity.

name: Lazy Bear
reason: Communal dinner party format with a standing cocktail hour that blends dining with genuine connection.

name: La Taqueria
reason: Legendary Mission taqueria with fast service and long communal benches, great for casual team outings.

name: Che Fico
reason: Wood-fired Italian with a bustling atmosphere and large-format dishes designed for group sharing.

name: Souvla
reason: Fast-casual Greek with a clean, modern space and quick service perfect for working lunches.

name: Mister Jiu's
reason: Michelin-starred Chinatown restaurant with a private banquet room available for team celebrations.

name: Anchor Oyster Bar
reason: Intimate Castro neighborhood gem with some of the best cioppino in the city for cozy team dinners.

name: Dumpling Home
reason: Affordable hand-pulled dumpling spot where ordering variety for the table becomes a collaborative activity.

name: Rich Table
reason: Inventive, playful menu with signature sardine chips that give teams something memorable to talk about.

name: Nopa
reason: Late-night friendly restaurant with a wood-fired rotisserie and organic ingredients in a loft-like space.
